title: Vanilla PVP Essentials
description: Vanilla-style overlay type pack with subtle cleanups.
body:
This pack is made for PvP and just overall smoother gameplay. It includes a low shield and removes the fishing bobber so your screen stays nice and clear during fights. Totem pops are smaller and powdered snow is more visible. It also has outlined ores to make mining easier, some small useful tweaks, and even a built-in brewing guide to help with potions. Super clean, simple, and just makes the game feel better whether you're PvPing or playing survival
